faqs.q: Do I need a minimum number of followers to join as a creator?
faqs.a: No. InfluencIA welcomes creators from 500 followers. What matters is your engagement quality and audience authenticity — both of which are reflected in your IA Score, not your follower count.

faqs.q: How is the IA Score calculated?
faqs.a: Your IA Score is a composite metric built from your real platform data: engagement rate (30%), audience authenticity (25%), content consistency (20%), past campaign results (15%), and profile completeness (10%). It updates in real time.

faqs.q: How does payment work for influencers?
faqs.a: Brands fund campaigns upfront via escrow before any work begins. Once your content is approved, payment is released automatically within 48 hours — no invoices, no chasing, no delays.

faqs.q: As a brand, how long does it take to find matching creators?
faqs.a: Our AI delivers an initial shortlist within a few minutes of receiving your brief. Most brands receive their first collaboration confirmed within 72 hours.

faqs.q: What platforms are supported for creator profiles?
faqs.a: Currently Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, and Facebook. LinkedIn, Pinterest, and Snapchat integrations are on the roadmap.

faqs.q: Can I run campaigns with both nano and macro influencers?
faqs.a: Yes. InfluencIA supports creators across all tiers — from nano (500–10K) to micro (10K–100K) to macro (100K+). You can mix tiers within a single campaign.
Yes. The Starter plan is free and lets brands run up to 3 active campaigns with 10 creator invitations per month. Creators can always join and apply for free.

faqs.q: How does InfluencIA verify that follower counts are authentic?
faqs.a: All social accounts are connected via official OAuth APIs. Our IA Score's authenticity component uses proprietary analysis to flag suspicious follower patterns — this data is shown transparently on every creator profile.

faqs.q: What regions does InfluencIA operate in?
faqs.a: We're currently focused on Morocco and the broader North Africa / Francophone region. Expansion to the Middle East and Sub-Saharan Africa is planned for 2025.

faqs.q: How do I get support if something goes wrong with a campaign?
faqs.a: All plans include access to our support team via in-platform chat. Growth and Enterprise plans get priority response times. Critical campaign issues are handled within 4 hours.
